title: DINOForge Pack Manifest
description: Schema for DINOForge pack manifest files (pack.yaml).

classification.description: Pack classification tier: determines mod menu display and accessible features.

depends_on.description: List of pack IDs this pack depends on.

conflicts_with.description: List of pack IDs this pack conflicts with.

load_order.description: Load priority within the same dependency tier.

homepage_url.description: Optional homepage URL for the pack.

github_url.description: Optional GitHub repository URL for the pack.

badges.description: Author-declared or curated badges. Author-declarable: early-access, total-conversion. Curated (assigned externally): verified-author, editors-choice. Auto-computed: popular, compatibility-tested.

ui_theme.description: Custom color theme for this pack's mod menu detail pane.

logo.description: Pack-relative path to a PNG logo image that replaces the native main-menu title (e.g. 'assets/ui/menu_logo.png'). EPIC-027 visual takeover.

background_image.description: Pack-relative path to a full-bleed PNG that replaces the native main-menu background (e.g. 'assets/ui/menu_bg.png'). EPIC-027 visual takeover.

button_frame.description: Pack-relative path to a 9-slice PNG used as the normal-state frame sprite for native menu buttons (e.g. 'assets/ui/btn_normal.png'). EPIC-027 visual takeover.

button_frame_hover.description: Pack-relative path to a 9-slice PNG used as the highlighted-state frame sprite for native menu buttons (e.g. 'assets/ui/btn_hover.png'). EPIC-027 visual takeover.

loading_background.description: EPIC-027 shorthand: path (relative to pack root) to a 1920x1080 PNG/JPEG loading-screen background. Equivalent to loading_screen.background. total_conversion packs only.

loading_screen.description: EPIC-027 themed loading-screen takeover. Shown by the Runtime LoadingScreenController during the InitialGameLoader->MainMenu asset-load window and on scene transitions. total_conversion packs only.

background.description: Path (relative to pack root) to a 1920x1080 PNG/JPEG background image.

logo.description: Path (relative to pack root) to a max-512x256 transparent PNG logo.

tips.description: Rotating tip/lore strings shown during loading.

accent_color.description: Hex color for the progress bar and separator. Default: DINOForge cyan #33CCFF.

overlay_opacity.description: Alpha of the background image overlay (0 = transparent, 1 = opaque).

settings.description: User-configurable runtime settings exposed in the F10 mod menu.

display_name.description: Human-readable label shown in the mod menu.

type.description: Data type; determines which UI control is rendered.

default_value.description: Default value (bool, number, or string depending on type).

description.description: Tooltip or help text for this setting.

min.description: Minimum value for type=int or type=float (inclusive).

max.description: Maximum value for type=int or type=float (inclusive).

update_check.description: GitHub release update-check configuration. When set, the runtime polls for newer releases.

patches.description: RimWorld-style cross-pack patch operations applied after all packs load.

faction_patches.description: Faction patch definition IDs to apply to existing factions.

economy_profiles.description: M6 Economy profile definition file paths.

resources.description: M6 Economy resource definition file paths.

trade_routes.description: M6 Economy trade route definition file paths.

hud_elements.description: M11 UI HUD element definition file paths.

menus.description: M11 UI menu definition file paths.

themes.description: M11 UI theme definition file paths.

ui_themes.description: M11 UI theme definition file paths (alternate naming).

ui_overlays.description: M11 UI overlay definition file paths.
